name: Doubao Realtime ASR
description:
Streaming speech recognition. Requires an API Key and Resource ID.

## Usage

1. **Enable a model**: enable a realtime speech recognition model in the [Volcengine speech console](https://console.volcengine.com/speech/service/16), such as Realtime ASR 2.0 or SeedASR.
2. **Get an API Key**: create and copy an API Key from the [API Key page](https://console.volcengine.com/speech/new/setting/apikeys).
3. **Get the Resource ID**: after purchasing, copy the matching Resource ID, for example `volc.bigasr.sauc.duration`.
4. **Configure the plugin**: paste the API Key in Omni Code and choose the matching Resource ID.

zh.description:
流式语音识别，需配置 API Key 和 Resource ID。

## 使用流程

1. **开通模型**：在[火山引擎语音识别控制台](https://console.volcengine.com/speech/service/16)开通实时语音识别模型（如流式语音识别模型 2.0 或 SeedASR）。
2. **获取 API Key**：在[API Key 管理页面](https://console.volcengine.com/speech/new/setting/apikeys)创建并复制 API Key。
3. **获取 Resource ID**：在控制台购买成功后，获取对应的 Resource ID（如 `volc.bigasr.sauc.duration`）。
4. **配置插件**：在 Omni Code 中粘贴 API Key 并选择对应的 Resource ID。

setting_fields.label: Resource ID
setting_fields.help: Sent as X-Api-Resource-Id. Choose the exact edition purchased in the Volcengine speech console.
